description.default: Whether you're building from scratch, expanding operations, or upgrading your storage systems, GOLIATH™ provides the protection your investment deserves.

proj1Desc.default: Complete warehouse construction projects with GOLIATH™ protection integrated from the ground up.

proj2Desc.default: Expanding your facility? Protect new racking installations while maintaining consistency with existing systems.

proj3Desc.default: Upgrading your storage system? Add GOLIATH™ to ensure your investment is protected for decades.

proj4Desc.default: Identify high-risk areas and install proactive protection where forklift traffic is heaviest.
